Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Akura family cloudship]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — The Akura family has a cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — The Akura cloudship is described as being so sleek that it looks smaller than its actual size.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — An Akura cloudship arrived at Sky's Edge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon's team loaded onto a small Akura cloudship to leave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Pride was operating the control panel of a small Akura cloudship.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — A flock of venomous presences was approaching an Akura cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Akura cloudships might leave if there is a delay.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — The Akura cloudships have stopped taking passengers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — The Akura cloudships were gone.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
